title: log_group
description: One log group or log destination — AWS CloudWatch Logs log group, GCP log bucket, Azure Log Analytics workspace. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for retention and encryption checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (CloudWatch: ARN, GCP: bucket name).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

retention_set.description: A retention policy is configured (not 'never expire').

retention_days.description: Configured retention in days. 0 when retention is set to never-expire or when retention_set=false.

kms_encrypted.description: Log storage is encrypted with a customer-managed key.
